sglang.title: update ROCm docker for layernorm kernel optimization
sglang.author: kkHuang-amd
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
For better performance on rms_kernel for ROCm
Modifications
Dockerfile.rocm, change the base image
Checklist

[+] Format your code according to the Contributor Guide.
[+] Add unit tests as outlined in the Contributor Guide.
[+] Update documentation as needed, including docstrings or examp

sglang.title: Support w8a8 int8 quantization config
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Add quantization config for w8a8 int8 with int8 GEMM in sgl-kernel and int8 quant kernel.
w8a8_int8 can achieve ~10% higher output throughput and without accuracy loss compared to the original compressed-tensors config. (Tested on A100)
Meta-Llama-3-8B-Instruct W8A8:
# compressed-tensors

sglang.title: feat: support internlm 3 dense
sglang.author: zhyncs
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
^ Please specify the chat template when using the chat completions API.
python3 -m sglang.launch_server --model internlm/internlm3-8b-instruct --trust-remote-code --chat-template internlm2-chat

curl http://127.0.0.1:30000/v1/chat/completions \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H

sglang.title: introduce CUB in sgl-kernel
sglang.author: BBuf

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix various bugs in multi-modal processor
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes:

Placeholder search results in duplicate outputs when different modalities share the same placeholder tokens
_apply_prompt_replacements being called unconditionally because of iterating over .items() instead of .values()
Unable to call get_max_tokens_per_item_by_modality for models that requi

vllm.title: [Kernel] Revert the API change of Attention.forward
vllm.author: heheda12345
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The changing of kv_cache -> _kv_cache and attn_metadata -> _attn_metadata in Attention.forward by #11967 breaks models that pass these two arguments with kwargs, e.g., phi3_small:
attn_output = self.attn(q, k, v, kv_cache, attn_metadata=attn_metadata)

And this script is crashed
from vllm import LLM

vllm.title: [Platform] Add output for Attention Backend
vllm.author: wangxiyuan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Part for #11162
This PR make use_output check to attention backend. So that each backend can decide its own way.

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Kernel] Give unique name to BlockSparseFlashAttention
vllm.author: heheda12345
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
As BlockSparseFlashAttention has less feature support than flash attention, e.g., not support use_output, which causes the crash of the following simplest script, I suggest create a unique name for it instead of reuse FLASH_ATTN.
CC @Isotr0py Is there any historical reason for implementing get_name

vllm.title: Explain where the engine args go when using Docker
vllm.author: hmellor

vllm.title: [Doc]: Update the Json Example of the `Engine Arguments` document
vllm.author: maang-h
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Update the Json Example of the Engine Arguments document to address non-ascii issue.
FIX #11965

vllm.title: [Misc]  Merge bitsandbytes_stacked_params_mapping and packed_modules_mapping
vllm.author: jeejeelee
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
They can be converted between each other. We can remove bitsandbytes_stacked_params_mapping and convert packed_modules_mapping to achieve the functionality of bitsandbytes_stacked_params_mapping, thereby further cleaning up the model's static variables
TODO

 delete  bitsandbytes_stacked_params_mapp

vllm.title: [Kernel] Support MulAndSilu
vllm.author: jeejeelee
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Currently there are 3 models in vllm that use this activation function: jais, ultravox and molmo. Implementing this kernel helps improve the performance of these models.
PS : It appears JAIS has different activation function choices, so keeping it unchanged for now.
ping @WoosukKwon  @tlrmchlsmth

vllm.title: [HPU][Bugfix] Don't use /dev/accel/accel0 for HPU autodetection in setup.py
vllm.author: kzawora-intel
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR fixes the issue observed in #11018, where _is_hpu might return True for systems containing Intel NPU, but not HPU.
HPU autodetection is skipped completely if VLLM_TARGET_DEVICE was explicitly set to something else. If VLLM_TARGET_DEVICE was not provided, autodetection continues, but no longe

vllm.title: [Platform] Refactor current_memory_usage() function in DeviceMemoryProfiler to Platform
vllm.author: shen-shanshan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
What does this PR do?
This PR is a refactoring of current_memory_usage() function in DeviceMemoryProfiler.
I put this function into Platform and implement it in each XxxPlatform subclass, making DeviceMemoryProfiler platform agnostic.
Related works
Please see #11162.

vllm.title: [V1][BugFix] Fix edge case in VLM scheduling
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR fixes the bug found by @ywang96 in #11895 (comment)

vllm.title: [Misc] Add multipstep chunked-prefill support for FlashInfer
vllm.author: elfiegg
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Support multi-step scheduling for chunked-prefill on FlashInfer, where prefill tokens are turned into decode tokens after the first single step.
cc @comaniac @yzh199 @WoosukKwon @youkaichao

vllm.title: [core] Turn off GPU communication overlap for Ray executor
vllm.author: ruisearch42
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The feature is still experimental in Ray Compiled Graphs. Turning off by default.
FIX #12026

vllm.title: [Doc] Update examples to remove SparseAutoModelForCausalLM
vllm.author: kylesayrs
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose

Update LLM Compressor documentation on vLLM to reflect new workflow

Changes

Update examples to remove SparseAutoModelForCausalLM. Now users can load their models from the transformer AutoModels directly

vllm.title: [V1][Prefix Cache] Move the logic of num_computed_tokens into KVCacheManager
vllm.author: heheda12345
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This pr is a preparation for hybrid memory allocator (Ref: #11382)

Move the logic of full cache hit into KVCacheManager to prepare for supporting sliding window.
For sliding window, if the sliding window size is 2 and block_size is 1, when computed blocks=[1,2,x,4,5],  where x is an evicted block,
